title: carlina subacaulis var. caulescens
intro: Carlina subacaulis var. caulescens, also known as a variety of the lesser hawk's beard plant, is a flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Carlina subacaulis var. caulescens include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to improve digestion and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
